# MCC

The goal of MCC is to compute the mean cumulative count of a recurrent
event

## Installation

You can install the development version of MCC like so:

``` r

pak::pak("tjuheide/MCC")
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`carryforward()`](https://tjuheide.github.io/MCC/reference/carryforward.md)
  : Carry forward last non-NA
- [`checkData()`](https://tjuheide.github.io/MCC/reference/checkData.md)
  : Generic data check for obvious errors
- [`expandMCC()`](https://tjuheide.github.io/MCC/reference/expandMCC.md)
  : Expand MCC-estimates to all times
- [`mcc()`](https://tjuheide.github.io/MCC/reference/mcc.md) : Mean
  Cumulative Count for Recurrent Events
- [`mcc_events`](https://tjuheide.github.io/MCC/reference/mcc_events.md)
  : Times and events
- [`mcc_events_bs`](https://tjuheide.github.io/MCC/reference/mcc_events_bs.md)
  : Times and events across 500 bootstrap iterations
- [`minmax()`](https://tjuheide.github.io/MCC/reference/minmax.md) :
  Longest shared follow-up
